serverInfo.name: mathieu-haye-portfolio
serverInfo.title: Mathieu Haye Portfolio
serverInfo.description: Read-only MCP surface for Mathieu Haye's portfolio. Exposes site content (projects, journal, contact, availability) via WebMCP in-browser tools and static metadata.

transport.description: In-browser WebMCP via navigator.modelContext.provideContext(). No remote MCP endpoint is exposed. Tools are registered when the page is loaded in a WebMCP-capable client.

tools.name: contact_info
tools.description: Return Mathieu Haye's contact information (email, phone, LinkedIn, location, languages, status).

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List Mathieu Haye's portfolio projects with key facts (stack, metrics, status).

tools.name: list_skills
tools.description: List the technical skills displayed on the site (AI, Python/data, CRM, business literacy).

tools.name: list_journal_articles
tools.description: List all journal articles (FR + EN) with title, date, language, HTML and Markdown URLs. Optional filter by language and limit.

tools.name: get_article_markdown
tools.description: Fetch a journal article in Markdown by slug or full URL.

tools.name: get_availability
tools.description: Check Mathieu's availability for freelance briefs and new client engagements.

tools.name: site_map
tools.description: Structured list of all addressable resources of the site (HTML, Markdown, JSON, RSS, agent metadata).

tools.name: open_section
tools.description: Scroll the homepage to a named section (hero, services, approach, offer, projects, agent, about, contact).

tools.name: open_project
tools.description: Open the details modal for a specific project (falls back to the /projets portfolio page when the card is not on the current page).

tools.name: switch_language
tools.description: Switch the site language between English (en) and French (fr) by navigating to the static mirror (/ = FR, /en/ = EN).

resources.name: journal-index
resources.description: Machine-readable index of all journal articles
